creator: ikevin.m10@globaltechnopolis.com
text: We are a new business located in Tokyo, Japan focused on providing software development and systems integration services for our clients. Being a strong believer of the BSD operating systems, FreeBSD is our top recommendation to our clients to use as a rock-solid, high-performance and extremely stable server. We have also done a write-up specific to FreeBSD on this page: http://globaltechnopolis.com/services/consulting/operating-systems-and-platforms/bsd/freebsd/index.html Therefore, we request that our company information be added to your list of consultants under Asia/Japan. The link should go to either: http://globaltechnopolis.com/services/consulting/operating-systems-and-platforms/bsd/freebsd/index.html (this is the same link give above) OR http://globaltechnopolis.com/ Please include a simple write about our company in your alphebetical listings page: ---------------------------------------------------- The Global Technopolis Corporation provides computing technology consulting services including strategy and implementation proposals, administration, maintenance, hosting, support, and training for FreeBSD. Our engineers can assist your business to set up routers/gateways, web servers, applications servers, database servers, backup servers and so forth. Professional project management and on-time delivery within budget is always our commitment to our clients. ---------------------------------------------------- Thank you! Regards, Kevin K. Han.
